title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SYMMETRY CARE INC MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This program provides outpatient mental health services, evaluation and outpatient treatment for substance abuse, referral to residential treatment programs, follow-up for individuals coming out of residential treatment, outpatient treatment program for problem gamblers, and education and outreach to the community. 348 W Adams Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-8376 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-8376 Reception Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. No one will be denied care due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Community Mental Health Agencies Gambling Disorder Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HARNEY COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SYMMETRY CARE INC
